title: aconitum arcuatum subsp. axilliflorum
intro: Aconitum arcuatum subsp. axilliflorum is a subspecies of the Aconitum genus, commonly known as a perennial flowering plant native to the Himalayas. This plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, including its ability to numb the skin and relieve pain. The health benefits of Aconitum arcuatum subsp. axilliflorum include its potential use in treating fever, rheumatism, and other inflammatory conditions. Herbal preparations of this plant are typically made by drying the roots and using them in infusions or decoctions, although it is essential to exercise caution when handling the plant due to its toxicity.
